metadata.title: Slashie — Get local help with trusted quotes
metadata.description: Post a task, get quotes from nearby workers, and pay the worker directly. Slashie takes no cut of the job.

hero.heading: Get local help. Hire with confidence.
hero.body: Post a task, get quotes from nearby workers, pick who you want. You pay the worker directly — Slashie takes no cut of the job.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.body: Three steps from task to done.

steps.title: Post
steps.body: Tell workers what you need, when, and where.

steps.title: Compare quotes
steps.body: See prices, profiles, reviews, and worker details.

steps.title: Hire & pay directly
steps.body: Choose a worker and settle payment between you.

customer.title: For customers
items: Choose by price, profile, and reviews

worker.title: For workers
items: Find real tasks on the map
Send quotes and win work nearby
Keep the job price you agree with the customer

points: No platform cut from the job
Payment stays between customer and worker
Profiles, reviews, and proof of past work
Local tasks, local workers, clear quotes

pricingTeaser.heading: Simple pricing
pricingTeaser.body: Customers use Slashie for free. Workers get free quotes each month, then can subscribe for unlimited quoting.
pricingTeaser.freeBody: Browse tasks and send quotes on the free tier.

finalCta.heading: Ready to get local help?
finalCta.body: Post a task or start quoting as a worker. It only takes a minute.

metadata.title: Slashie — 用可信報價找到本地幫手
metadata.description: 發布任務，取得附近工作者的報價，直接向工作者付款。Slashie 不抽取任務費用。

hero.heading: 找本地幫手，安心聘用。
hero.body: 發布任務，取得附近工作者的報價，選你想聘用的人。你直接向工作者付款，Slashie 不抽取任務費用。

steps.title: 發布
steps.body: 說明你需要什麼、時間和地點。

steps.title: 比較報價
steps.body: 查看價格、個人檔案、評價和工作者資料。

steps.title: 聘用並直接付款
steps.body: 選定工作者，雙方自行完成付款。

customer.title: 給客戶
items: 比較附近工作者的報價
按價格、檔案和評價選擇

worker.title: 給工作者
items: 在地圖上找到真實任務
發送報價，接附近的工作
保留你與客戶議定的任務收入

points: 付款由客戶和工作者直接安排
個人檔案、評價和過往作品更清楚
本地任務、本地工作者、清楚報價

pricingTeaser.heading: 簡單收費
pricingTeaser.body: 客戶免費使用 Slashie。工作者每月有免費報價額度，需要更多時可訂閱無限報價。
pricingTeaser.freeBody: 用免費方案瀏覽任務並發送報價。

finalCta.heading: 準備找本地幫手？
finalCta.body: 發布任務，或以工作者身份開始報價。只需一分鐘。
